## 🎯 Hackathon Criteria

<!-- Check the criteria impacted by this PR -->

- [ ] **Human Experience** - Improves UX/UI or user interaction
- [ ] **Data Management** - Data processing, storage, or flow
- [ ] **Privacy by Design** - Privacy respect and data protection
- [ ] **Scalability** - Performance and scalability capabilities

## 🧪 Testing

<!-- How did you test these changes? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/modified

## 🔒 Security & Privacy

<!-- Check if applicable -->

- [ ] No sensitive data in code or logs
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets/API keys
- [ ] Environment variables properly used
- [ ] User input validation implemented
- [ ] GDPR compliance respected (if handling personal data)

## 📊 Performance & Scalability

<!-- If applicable -->

- [ ] Performance impact assessed
- [ ] Optimizations applied (specify)
- [ ] No performance regression
- [ ] Cloud Run resource management optimized

## 📚 Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if necessary)
- [ ] Code comments added for complexity
- [ ] API documentation updated (if endpoint modified)
- [ ] Prompts/notes added in `docs/` (if applicable)

## ✅ Final Checklist

- [ ] My code follows project conventions (Conventional Commits, naming)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] My code generates no warnings
- [ ] Less than 400 lines modified (excluding documentation) ✨
- [ ] Added dependencies are necessary and documented
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`/`develop`
- [ ] No merge conflicts
